title: Cyclobalanopsis stewardiana

The genus Cyclobalanopsis is further divided into several species, including C. stewardiana, and is native to eastern Asia. The Fagaceae family also includes other oak species, such as Quercus and Lithocarpus. The classification of C. stewardiana reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plant species within the same family and genus.
